alkylation reagent: alkylated (50 mM iodacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate buffer for 30 min at 25 °C)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (50 mM iodacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate buffer for 30 min at 25 °C)
cleavage agent: digested with sequencing-grade chymotrypsin (Promega) overnight at 37 °C
instrument: the ion count target value was 1,000,000 for the survey scan and 50,000 for the MS/MS scan
